reason: The shared app shell is still above the 550-line hard budget after the 2.9.7 shared tabbed-editor, 2.9.8 runtime hardening, and 2.9.9 observability control-plane work kept additional session, support-session, scope, and admin orchestration in App.js. Release closeout for 2.9.9 carries a time-bound exception so CI stays honest while the next frontend-focused milestone pulls the remaining shell orchestration into focused modules.
